'''Cyril Stacul''' (born 12 October 1984) is a French [[rugby league]] coach and former player who played as a {{rlp|wg}}er or {{rlp|ce}} for the [[FC Lezignan]] in the [[Elite One Championship]] and has played for [[France national rugby league team|France]] at international level and currently coaches [[FC Lezignan]] in the [[Super XIII]].

He previously played for the [[Catalans Dragons]] in the [[Super League]] and [[Baroudeurs de Pia XIII|SM Pia XIII]] in the [[Elite One Championship|French top flight]].

Stacul was named in the [[France national rugby league team#2008 World Cup Squad|France training squad]] for the [[2008 Rugby League World Cup]].<ref name="France dominated by Dragons">{{cite web|url=http://www.skysports.com/story/0,19528,12196_3949078,00.html|title=France dominated by Dragons|publisher=Sky Sports|date=2008-08-07|accessdate=2008-08-08}}</ref>

He represented France again in the [[2010 European Cup]].
